# Happy Nails

> Happy Nails is a fixed-location nail salon at 1508 E 55th Street in Chicago's Hyde Park neighborhood. This site presents a curated portfolio of documented manicures, acrylic sets, and nail art.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/): Business profile, featured designs, services, location, and contact actions.
- [Gallery](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/): Curated nail design portfolio with individual design pages.
- [Services](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/services/): Manicures, acrylic sets, and nail art.

## Gallery Collections

- [French](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/french/)
- [Chrome](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/chrome/)
- [Acrylic](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/acrylic/)
- [Nail Art](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/nail-art/)
- [Minimal](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/minimal/)
- [Seasonal](https://happy-nails4chicago.edan.io/gallery/collections/seasonal/)

## Contact

- Phone: (773) 966-4733
- Address: 1508 E 55th St, Chicago, Illinois
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/happynails55/
